title: Define search index input boundary
goal: Bind the static search index input contract as a deterministic no-runtime input boundary.

acceptance.assertion: Allowed future search index input fields and deterministic rebuild policy are defined.
No search runtime, vector database, crawler, ingestion worker, submissions, auth or write path is introduced.
Contract validation is wired into repository validation.

validated_acceptance.search-input-contract: Allowed future search index input fields and deterministic rebuild policy are defined.
validated_acceptance.boundary: No search runtime, vector database, crawler, ingestion worker, submissions, auth or write path is introduced.
validated_acceptance.validation: Contract validation is wired into repository validation.

validation: make validate plus search index input contract checks
PR body records the no-runtime/no-authority boundary.
